name: Playwright Chromium OS dependencies
description: Installs the system libraries Chromium needs at image build time. The container has no runtime sudo (cap-drop=ALL, no-new-privileges), so this cannot happen post-create. Browser binaries download at post-create into the persistent agents volume. See docs/browser-automation.md for the full per-project recipe.

version.description: playwright npm version used to resolve the apt dependency list. Pin (e.g. "1.50.1") to freeze the list, ideally matching the Playwright version bundled by the project's @playwright/cli.
